name: clawkeeper
description: Security, compliance, and threat detection for the Claude ecosystem. By RAD Security.

plugins.name: clawkeeper-code
plugins.description: Security scanning, threat detection, and Cowork guardrails for Claude Code and Claude Desktop. Adds /clawkeeper-code:cowork-install — a PreToolUse hook that blocks Cowork tool calls touching PHI, secrets, or other restricted paths per local policy. Plus Claude Code threat detection: 24+ patterns, audit, secret scanning, plugin inspection. Works immediately — no account required.

plugins.name: clawkeeper-cowork
plugins.description: Data governance and compliance for Cowork. Classifies sensitive data, detects PII, enforces org policies, verifies external recipients, and maintains a full audit trail. Works immediately — no account required.
